assertionResults.observation: Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: The journal persists owner, chain, deployment, pool, recipient, refund target, value, distribution, protected minima, settings fingerprint, nonce, and hash.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Reload resumes the same pending add intent without another wallet prompt or duplicate journal record.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Confirmation, replacement, timeout, revert, and orphan states remain attached to the same intent lineage.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A new form intent clears stale form-scoped banners but preserves owner-scoped transaction history.

environment.operatingSystem: GitHub-hosted Linux and independently recorded exact-head validation
